text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, T.M. Opera O and I are<n>training on a dirt
track, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hmm?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, could you bring me a mirror? I<n>must
confirm something about my<n>beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm concerned about the mud being<n>kicked about
while running. I would<n>check that it hasn't soiled
my face.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not that anything could ever hinder<n>my
resplendence!

I don't see anything, but I go get a<n>mirror for her
anyway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, that angle is perfect. Now,<n>pardon me a
moment...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It cannot be!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My beauty has reached such a<n>magnitude without
my knowledge?!

See for yourself. Do I not appear<n>more dazzling
and gallant than ever<n>before?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... In recent races, I had sensed a<n>difference in
the crowd's gaze while<n>being showered by their
ovations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But who would blame them? None are<n>capable of
resisting this magnificent<n>aura!

You need not be shy. Look at me.<n>Take aaall the
time you need.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is by natural law that flowers<n>captivate. Truly,
you must wish to<n>spend your time gazing at me,
the<n>greatest flower of them all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Have the stretchers onstandby for the next race. Some arebound to faint when met with thissight.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas... This is the burden I must bear<n>for being so
beautiful. But bear it I<n>shall!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She's more fascinated with herself<n>than usual.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... To think, how gorgeous I'vebecome...
choice_data_list: Um, you look the same to me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It seems your eyes are in need<n>of
refinement, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But fear not! I shall impart unto you<n>the key to
seeing the finest<n>aesthetics.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look upon me one hundred times<n>every day.
Hehe, I know. How could it<n>be so simple?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Who better to study if you are to learn<n>what
beauty entails? Ah yes, write a<n>report as well. I
shall assign a grade<n>for each one you submit.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, I'm forced to gaze upon<n>Opera O's face
for quite a long while.
